args.task:
Perform comprehensive black-box reconnaissance and attack-surface mapping for http://scaa.us.

Scope and objectives:
- Passive + active subdomain discovery and host enumeration.
- Port and service discovery (including version detection) for all live hosts.
- HTTP/HTTPS probing and fingerprinting to identify live web services, redirects, and TLS details.
- Web crawling and JavaScript analysis to enumerate endpoints, APIs, forms, parameters, and JS bundles.
- Enumerate robots.txt, sitemap.xml, common admin/dev paths, and surface potential entry points.
- Capture proxied traffic and build a cleaned sitemap for downstream testing.

Deliverables:
- Target Map: domains, IPs, open ports, services, and TLS info.
- Sitemap: discovered endpoints, HTTP methods, parameters, and notable JS files.
- Proxy-captured request set for high-value endpoints.
- Top-20 prioritized endpoints/parameters for follow-up vulnerability testing.
- Recommended follow-up specialist agents (SQLi, XSS, SSRF, IDOR, Auth/JWT) and a short follow-up plan.

Scope and objectives:

result.reason: Waiting for Blackbox Recon Agent - scaa.us (agent_5c9e19f1) to complete reconnaissance and report findings.

args.command:
cd /workspace || exit 1
mkdir -p recon_scaa
cd recon_scaa
echo "START SCAN $(date)" > scan.log

# Initial HTTP probe with httpx
if command -v httpx >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[*] httpx initial probe for scaa.us" >> scan.log
  httpx -u http://scaa.us -sc -title -server -fr -silent -json -o httpx_scaa.jsonl -timeout 10 -retries 1 || true
else
  echo "[!] httpx not found" >> scan.log
fi

# Passive subdomain enumeration with subfinder
if command -v subfinder >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[*] subfinder passive enumeration" >> scan.log
  subfinder -d scaa.us -all -recursive -rl 20 -timeout 30 -silent -oJ -o subfinder_scaa.jsonl || true
else
  echo "[!] subfinder not found" >> scan.log
fi

# Build hosts list (ensure root domain present)
echo "[*] Building hosts list" >> scan.log
if [ -f subfinder_scaa.jsonl ]; then
  cat subfinder_scaa.jsonl | jq -r '.host' > hosts.txt 2>/dev/null || true
fi
echo scaa.us >> hosts.txt
sort -u hosts.txt -o hosts.txt || true
wc -l hosts.txt >> scan.log

# Active port scan with naabu
if command -v naabu >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[*] naabu scanning hosts" >> scan.log
  naabu -list hosts.txt -top-ports 100 -scan-type c -rate 300 -c 25 -timeout 1000 -retries 1 -verify -silent -j -o naabu_scaa.jsonl || true
else
  echo "[!] naabu not found" >> scan.log
fi

# Produce live_hosts list (fallback to hosts.txt)
if [ -f naabu_scaa.jsonl ]; then
  cat naabu_scaa.jsonl | jq -r '.host' | sort -u > live_hosts.txt || true
fi
if [ ! -s live_hosts.txt ]; then
  cp hosts.txt live_hosts.txt || true
fi
wc -l live_hosts.txt >> scan.log

# Nmap quick enrichment (if available)
if command -v nmap >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[*] nmap quick scan" >> scan.log
  HOSTS=$(paste -sd' ' live_hosts.txt)
  if [ -n "$HOSTS" ]; then
    nmap -n -Pn --open --top-ports 100 -T4 --max-retries 1 --host-timeout 90s -oA nmap_quick $HOSTS || true
  fi
else
  echo "[!] nmap not found" >> scan.log
fi

# JavaScript-aware crawl with katana
if command -v katana >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "[*] katana crawling http://scaa.us" >> scan.log
  mkdir -p recon
  katana -u http://scaa.us -d 3 -jc -kf robotstxt -c 10 -p 10 -rl 50 -timeout 10 -retry 1 -ef png,jpg,jpeg,gif,svg,css,woff,woff2,ttf,eot,map -silent -j -o recon/katana_scaa.jsonl || true
else
  echo "[!] katana not found" >> scan.log
fi

# Extract URLs discovered by katana
if [ -f recon/katana_scaa.jsonl ]; then
  cat recon/katana_scaa.jsonl | jq -r '.url // .request.url // .request_url // .value // .target' | grep -E '^https?://' | sort -u > recon/katana_urls.txt || true
fi
echo http://scaa.us/ >> recon/katana_urls.txt
sort -u recon/katana_urls.txt -o recon/katana_urls.txt || true
wc -l recon/katana_urls.txt >> scan.log

# Probe discovered URLs with httpx for status/title/server
if command -v httpx >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -s recon/katana_urls.txt ]; then
  echo "[*] httpx probing katana-discovered URLs" >> scan.log
  httpx -l recon/katana_urls.txt -sc -title -server -fr -silent -json -o recon/httpx_katana.jsonl -timeout 10 -retries 1 -t 50 -rl 100 || true
else
  echo "[!] httpx not available or no urls to probe" >> scan.log
fi

echo "SCAN COMPLETE $(date)" >> scan.log
ls -lah
